workflow.desc: Backend Code Review - Reviews backend implementation against design documents and standards

field.name: design_doc_path
field.desc: Path to backend module design document

field.name: source_root
field.desc: Root directory of backend source code

field.name: api_contract_path
field.desc: Path to API contract file for endpoint validation

field.name: previous_review_path
field.desc: Path to previous review report for incremental review

block.field: NEVER modify source code files - read-only operation
Do NOT attempt to fix issues - only document them
PARTIAL/FAIL results MUST include specific Re-dispatch Guidance
If previous_review_path provided, skip items already marked as passed
Verify all required parameters provided
Report error and stop

- Module Overview: Module name, responsibilities - File Structure: Required files (DO, VO, Mapper, Service, Controller, Convert, Enums) - Class Specifications: Class names, inheritance requirements, annotations - API Endpoints: Endpoint definitions, HTTP methods, paths - Business Logic: Service methods, transaction requirements
Completed Files, Implementation Status, Known Issues
Endpoint Definitions, Request/Response Schemas, HTTP Methods, Error Codes
API contract not provided - skipping API validation
No previous review - performing full review

- Enums: enums/*.java (e.g., enums/ErrorCodeConstants.java) - DO: dal/dataobject/**/*.java (e.g., dal/dataobject/employee/EmployeeDO.java) - VO: controller/admin/vo/**/*.java (e.g., controller/admin/vo/EmployeeRespVO.java) - Mapper: dal/mapper/**/*.java (e.g., dal/mapper/employee/EmployeeMapper.java) - Service: service/**/*.java (e.g., service/employee/EmployeeService.java) - Controller: controller/admin/**/*.java (e.g., controller/admin/employee/EmployeeController.java) - Convert: convert/**/*.java (e.g., convert/employee/EmployeeConvert.java)
Use Glob to scan for implemented files
completeness_pct = (created / required) * 100

- Base Class: Must extend correct base class (e.g., TenantBaseDO) - Severity: ERROR - @TableName: Must have @TableName with correct table name - Severity: ERROR - @Schema: Must have @Schema for documentation - Severity: WARN - Validation: Required fields must have @NotNull or similar - Severity: ERROR - Desensitization: Sensitive fields must have desensitization - Severity: ERROR

- Interface: Must have Service interface and implementation separation - Severity: WARN - @Service: Implementation must have @Service annotation - Severity: ERROR - @Transactional: DB write methods must have @Transactional - Severity: ERROR - Method Coverage: All methods in design must be implemented - Severity: ERROR - Data Permission: Must check data permissions where required - Severity: ERROR

- @RestController: Must have @RestController annotation - Severity: ERROR - @RequestMapping: Must have base @RequestMapping annotation - Severity: ERROR - @Operation: Endpoints should have @Operation for documentation - Severity: WARN - @PreAuthorize: Must have permission annotations where required - Severity: ERROR - @Valid: Request VO parameters must have @Valid - Severity: ERROR
- Verify Entity fields match design document - Check MyBatis XML mappers exist alongside Mapper interfaces - Validate Lombok @Data or similar on DO/VO classes

block.desc: Check if API contract validation needed

block.field: - Endpoint Coverage: All contract endpoints exist in Controller - Severity: ERROR - HTTP Method: Methods match contract - Severity: ERROR - Path Match: URL paths match contract exactly - Severity: ERROR - VO Fields: All contract fields present in VO - Severity: ERROR - Field Types: Data types match contract - Severity: ERROR
Skipping API consistency check
- PASS: 100% files created, 0 ERROR-level issues - PARTIAL: 70-99% files created, or non-critical ERROR issues - FAIL: <70% files created, or critical blockers present
templates/REVIEW-REPORT-TEMPLATE.md
speccrew-workspace/iterations/{number}-{type}-{name}/04.development/{platform_id}/[module]-review-report.md
